title: Company Profile
description: Runtime configuration that drives every contract review for a given organization. Edited via the workflow-configurator agent (chat interview) or by hand.

name.description: Legal entity name as it should appear in the review output.

short_name.description: Friendly short form used in chat output.

industry.description: Free-text industry description. Drives industry-module selection.

business_description.description: 2-4 sentence description of what the company does, used to contextualize specialists.

role_in_contracts.description: Typical role the company plays. Used as the speaker label in customer-facing comments.

secondary.description: Other jurisdictions the company operates in and is willing to contract under.

preferred_statutes.description: Map of topic key → statute citation. Specialists cite these in customer-facing comments so the voice matches the company's home jurisdiction.

disfavored_venues.description: Jurisdictions the company refuses to litigate in without negotiation.

positions.description: Negotiating positions, grouped by category. Categories map to specialist domains (commercial, risk_allocation, insurance, performance, termination, protective, compliance). Free-form — add custom categories as needed.

accepts.description: Clauses the company will sign as drafted.

rejects.description: Clauses the company will not agree to under any circumstances.

preferred_language.description: Template phrases the company prefers to insert.

red_flags.description: Critical deal-breakers. Scanned for by the critical-issues-auditor.

description.description: Full description of what this red flag means and how to spot it.

auto_escalate.description: If true, finding this always sets requires_senior_review=true.

trigger_phrases.description: Optional hint phrases to help the auditor grep for this flag.

senior_reviewers.description: People who receive escalation alerts. Surfaced in the internal review summary.

escalation_trigger_severity.description: Any finding at this severity or above is flagged for senior review.

speaker_label.description: How to refer to the company in customer-facing comments (e.g., 'Provider', 'Contractor', 'Licensor').

counterparty_label.description: Default label for the other party (e.g., 'Customer', 'Client', 'Owner').

cite_statutes.description: Whether specialists may cite statutes by section in customer-facing comments.

cite_industry_standards.description: Whether specialists may cite standard industry forms (ACORD, ISO CGL, etc.).

cite_case_law.description: DEFAULT FALSE. Case citations are disabled for hallucination-safety reasons. Override at your own risk.

max_comment_length_chars.description: Soft cap on margin-comment length. Defaults to 800.

forbidden_phrases.description: Phrases that must NEVER appear in customer-facing output. The review-compiler will block the deliverable if these are detected.

reviewer_author.description: Displayed as author on tracked changes and comments, e.g., 'Helix Legal'.

reviewer_initials.description: 2-4 chars. Shown in Word's comment balloons.

annotated_file_suffix.description: Appended to the customer-facing file name.

summary_file_suffix.description: Appended to the internal summary file name.

review_root.description: Output directory root (relative to project root).

enabled_modules.description: Feature toggles for optional industry modules. True = module agent joins the comprehensive-mode fan-out.

severity_scheme.description: Labels for the 4-tier severity system. Override if your team uses different terminology (e.g. P0/P1/P2/P3).

pipeline_mode_defaults.description: Per-contract-type pipeline-mode mapping. Classifier uses this to route.
